summary: The diff implements REQ-15 (form redesign), REQ-17 (high-spend row highlighting), REQ-18 (celebration animation with confetti and coin character), and partially addresses REQ-16 (background usage referenced in pages). However, the generated background image asset and celebration coin image are not added as new files. REQ-19 (backend data preservation) shows no backend file changes at all.

missing_requirements.requirement: Render the background as a generated SVG or PNG asset placed in frontend/public/assets/generated. Background asset is served from frontend/public/assets/generated.
missing_requirements.reason: No new files were added in the diff. The generated background asset (expense-bg-pattern.dim_800x800.png or equivalent SVG) is not present in frontend/public/assets/generated. The diff shows zero added files.

missing_requirements.requirement: The celebration-coin.dim_400x400.png image asset must be present at frontend/public/assets/generated for the celebration overlay to display correctly.
missing_requirements.reason: No new files were added in the diff. The celebration coin image referenced in AddExpense.tsx as /assets/generated/celebration-coin.dim_400x400.png has no corresponding added file. Code has an onError fallback but the asset itself is absent.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ensure all existing backend expense data is fully preserved. backend/main.mo must retain all stable variables. If migration needed, generate or update backend/migration.mo.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend files were modified or added in the diff. There is no evidence of backend/main.mo being reviewed for stable variable preservation or backend/migration.mo being created or updated.
